question:
The following stemplot has 18 observations. Prove that the value 152 in this data set is an outside value.
 egin{aligned}
& 08 	ext { | } 8 \
& 09 	ext { | } 59 \
& 10 	ext { | } 0147 \
& 11 	ext { | } 444679 \
& 12 	ext { | } 0145 \
& 13 	ext { | } \
& 14 	ext { | } \
& 15 	ext { | } 2 \
& 	imes 10
\end{aligned}
answer:
5 -point summary: $88,101,114,120,152$

$$
 egin{aligned}
& \mathrm{IQR}=120-101=19 \
& 	ext { Fence }_{	ext {Upper }}=120+(1.5)(19)=148.5
\end{aligned}
$$


The value 152 is outside the upper fence.
